prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='svr', seasonality_champion='FT_svr', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=2.54) and very high seasonality variance (0.93), indicating models capture patterns very differently. FT_svr excels at seasonality (0.49 correlation), svr tracks trend best (0.73 slope error), and CWT_catboost leads overall RMSE. With both disagreement and seasonality variance flags true, DBA combination is recommended to leverage model diversity while mitigating individual weaknesses.

With both disagreement and seasonality variance flags true, DBA combination is recommended to leverage model diversity while mitigating individual weaknesses."

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=2.54) and very high seasonality variance (0.93), indicating models capture patterns very differently. FT_svr excels at seasonality (0.49 correlation), svr tracks trend best (0.73 slope error), and CWT_catboost leads overall RMSE. With both disagreement and seasonality variance flags true, DBA combination is recommended to leverage model diversity while mitigating individual weaknesses.

proposer.rationale: n_unique_winners=8 indicates high model diversity favoring per-horizon selection. relative_spread_mean=0.96 (>>0.25) and rmse_spread_ratio=2.54 justify DBA combination for handling disagreement. n_windows=3 requires small top_k=3 with shrinkage≥0.3. Pattern analyst recommends dba_combination explicitly due to high seasonality variance (0.93). RMSE spread between CWT_catboost (872) and FT_rf (3383) exceeds 300% gap, favoring inverse_rmse_weights over simple mean.
